description: Local-first TikTok Content Posting API for AI agents: OAuth checks, dry-run and live uploads.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/tiktok-agent-publisher

environmentVariables.description: Set to false only when the agent should perform live TikTok upload operations. Defaults to dry-run behavior.
environmentVariables.name: TIKTOK_DRY_RUN

environmentVariables.description: TikTok developer app client key. Optional until OAuth or live upload flows are used.
environmentVariables.name: TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY

environmentVariables.description: TikTok developer app client secret. Keep local and do not expose it to agents.
environmentVariables.name: TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET

title: TikTok Agent Publisher
